message.raid_enhancement_patch.villager_: This villager is raid-protected and cannot be attacked by players.
command.raid_enhancement_patch.villager_: Protected %s nearby villagers within %s blocks for %s seconds; tracked total: %s.
Removed protection from %s nearby villagers within %s blocks; tracked total: %s.
Cleared %s protected villagers in this dimension; tracked total: %s.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.basic_str: Use: grants Strength I to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.advanced_: Use: grants Strength II to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.basic_shi: Use: grants 30 temporary health to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.advanced_: Use: grants 100 temporary health to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.basic_swi: Use: grants Speed I to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.advanced_: Use: grants Speed II to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.hunter_to: Use: grants Speed II and Strength I to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.basic_fir: Use: grants Fire Resistance to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.advanced_: Use: grants Fire Resistance and Regeneration I to security iron golems for 5 minutes.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.mercenary: Use: summons 2 temporary mercenary iron golems for 30 minutes by default.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.common.se: Only affects current battlefield security golems; failed use is not consumed.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.common.ra: Raid-only contract; mercenaries ignore player damage and withdraw when expired.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.common.me: By default works inside or outside raids; owner cannot damage them, other players can in PvP.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.basic_ins: Right-click: newly spawned raiders in the next 3 waves gain vanilla glowing.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.advanced_: Right-click: newly spawned raiders in all remaining waves gain vanilla glowing.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.basic_ral: Right-click: pulls up to 5 active raiders near the player.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.advanced_: Right-click: pulls up to 10 active raiders near the player; not consumed by default.
tooltip.raid_enhancement_patch.common.ra: Affects only the current village raid battlefield; failed use is not consumed.
